Hey everyone! The previous message was, of course, for April Fools.
However, there was a lot of truth in it. The amount of time and effort 
creeping into allt his is unsustainable without sufficient support. 
While some material (particularly, many stories) is contributed by 
the community… at times (details on the credits page, where you can 
also find others to support!), a lot of the translations, as well as 
management, tool development and help, etc are still done by 
me alone. If you can, please become a monthly supporter. 
Many bits go a long way. Without this, the project will soon die.

<size=20>Yes, I will start using this space for notices from now on. Hehe.</size>
